name: GlyNAC dose-ranging redox trial in healthy older adults
summary: A randomized controlled two-week dose-ranging study of GlyNAC in generally healthy older adults, focused on glutathione redox status, oxidative-damage biomarkers, amino-acid availability, safety, and tolerability.
population: Generally healthy older adults aged 60 to 85 years, with a young-adult reference group

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for NAD and Redox Restoration because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers and safety in Generally healthy older adults aged 60 to 85 years, with a young-adult reference group. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
